ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game, formatted as 'team_score-opponent_score' */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "end_of_year_record" TEXT /* End of year record in format 'wins-losses (conference record)' */,
  "bowl_game" TEXT /* Bowl game participation following the season */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game against the opponent */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Location of the game ('Home' or 'Away') */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., 'Regular', 'Bowl', 'Championship') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Official name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played during the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins during the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses during the season */,
  "conference_wins" INTEGER /* Number of conference wins during the season */,
  "conference_losses" INTEGER /* Number of conference losses during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowl_games" (
  "bowl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowl game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the bowl game */,
  "bowl_name" TEXT /* Name of the bowl game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent faced in the bowl game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the bowl game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the bowl game was played (city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowl_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendances" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game attended */,
  "attendance_number" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Average ticket price for the game */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rivalries" (
  "rivalry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rivalry */,
  "team_one_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team in the rivalry */,
  "team_two_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team in the rivalry */,
  "wins_one" INTEGER /* Wins by the first team in the rivalry */,
  "wins_two" INTEGER /* Wins by the second team in the rivalry */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played between the two teams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivalry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rivalries_team_two_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_two_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rivalries_team_one_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_one_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the statistics */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained during the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers made by the team */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties called on the team */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season they coached */,
  "record" TEXT /* Win-loss record during that season */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the coach (e.g., 'Head Coach', 'Assistant Coach') */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season they played */,
  "stats" TEXT /* Statistics recorded for the player during the season */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown (city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'admin', 'analyst', 'coach') */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_streaks" (
  "streak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streak */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the streak occurred in */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of streak ('win' or 'loss') */,
  "streak_length" INTEGER /* Number of games in the streak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("streak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_streaks_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient ('player' or 'coach') */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player or coach who received the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
